input.command:
python3 - <<'EOF'
import ast, os, sys

files_lines = [
    ("tests/admin_views/tests.py", [4349, 4392]),
    ("tests/utils_tests/test_encoding.py", [172, 175, 227, 228]),
    ("tests/httpwrappers/tests.py", [506]),
    ("django/templatetags/static.py", [48]),
    ("django/template/defaultfilters.py", [227]),
    ("django/utils/feedgenerator.py", [90, 100, 148, 153, 156, 197, 201, 292]),
    ("django/contrib/syndication/views.py", [21]),
    ("django/contrib/flatpages/models.py", [49]),
    ("django/http/response.py", [651]),
    ("django/http/request.py", [233, 300]),
]

BASE = "/private/tmp/omniweave-corpus/django"

results = []

for rel_path, target_lines in files_lines:
    full_path = os.path.join(BASE, rel_path)
    with open(full_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        source = f.read()
    tree = ast.parse(source)
    
    # Build a mapping: line -> enclosing function/class/method
    # Walk all function defs and class methods
    func_ranges = []
    for node in ast.walk(tree):
        if isinstance(node, (ast.FunctionDef, ast.AsyncFunctionDef)):
            # Find parent class if any
            func_ranges.append((node.lineno, node.end_lineno, node.name, node))
    
    # Also get class info
    class_map = {}
    for node in ast.walk(tree):
        if isinstance(node, ast.ClassDef):
            for child in ast.walk(node):
                if isinstance(child, (ast.FunctionDef, ast.AsyncFunctionDef)):
                    class_map[id(child)] = node.name

    for tl in target_lines:
        enclosing = None
        enclosing_class = None
        best_start = 0
        for start, end, name, node in func_ranges:
            if start <= tl <= end and start > best_start:
                best_start = start
                enclosing = name
                enclosing_class = class_map.get(id(node))
        if enclosing_class:
            full_name = f"{enclosing_class}.{enclosing}"
        else:
            full_name = enclosing or "<module>"
        results.append((rel_path, tl, full_name))

for r in results:
    print(f"{r[0]}:{r[1]}  →  {r[2]}")
EOF
